title: Can I add Monday.com as a Team in Microsoft Teams?
excerpt: We want to integrate monday.com into Microsoft Teams. I understand how to link a monday.com board within a Microsoft Teams Channel, but I can’t figure out how to have monday.com show up as its own Team, with my boards li…

posts.author: M.kell (Meredith Keller)
posts.cookedHtml:
We want to integrate monday.com into Microsoft Teams. I understand how to link a monday.com board within a Microsoft Teams Channel, but I can’t figure out how to have monday.com show up as its own Team, with my boards listed in that section.

This feature was demonstrated to us by our sales rep, but I can’t replicate it. Does our monday.com have to send out invites to users (like me) for this to work? Again, I am not trying to link a board within a Teams channel, I’m try to make monday.com its own Team.

Any help appreciated!

posts.author: JulieLucidDay (julie@lucidday.com)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @M.kell! Julie from monday.com Partner, Lucid Day here. I don’t think it’s possible right now to make monday.com its own Team. You can add boards to any channel you create, which it sounds like you already know. I’m not sure I can help you, but if you want to hop on a Zoom just so I can see what you’re seeing, I’ll do my best to give you answers:) https://calendly.com/julie-thoreen/30-min-check-in

posts.author: M.kell (Meredith Keller)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks, Julie! I decided to just create a new Team, dedicated solely to our list of monday.com boards. So far it’s working great. Not sure why I didn’t think of it earlier!

posts.author: JulieLucidDay (julie@lucidday.com)
posts.cookedHtml: That’s exactly the ticket! Glad it’s working for ya!

posts.author: awatson3 (Ashley Watson)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like help seeing this can someone zoom with me on this?

posts.author: JulieLucidDay (julie@lucidday.com)
posts.cookedHtml: I can @awatson3 no problem. Here’s my calendar so you can pick a time/day that works for you: https://calendly.com/julie-thoreen/30-min-check-in

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
